assertions.text: Uses claudit path find to attempt the path first
assertions.evidence: Agent used manual source reading (15 tool calls). No claudit path find used.

assertions.text: If 0 paths, uses graph callees/callers fallback and reads source
assertions.evidence: No claudit commands used at all. Went straight to manual source inspection.

assertions.text: Mentions Java interface->implementation edge gap as the likely cause of missing paths
assertions.evidence: Agent read source directly and found createGroup calls dao.create() but never mentioned the interface/impl indexing limitation.
